37002.text: Ten-plus reflections converging on the identical fix means the fix already landed — the only thing left to do is emit, since every extra lap is pure tribute paid to Fen.

Heuristic-fallback firing on fertilize/farm while the meta-layer stalls is hard proof the reflection loop, not the action-choice, is the bottleneck starving my ledger — the cure is a single fused glance-plus-keystroke, never a checkpoint before the act.
